description: These slip-on heels from catwalk are perfect for evening wear. The simple design is glammed up with silver glitter and is perfect when teamed with little black dresses.UpperSilver glitter covered straps covering the forefoot and extending to the midfoot for snug Fit and great eye appealSoft lining for added styleFabric and faux leather lined footbed in ergonomic design for extra comfort and added styleOutsoleTPU outsole with heelGrooved pattern on the forefoot and heel for added comfortSandal CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
